children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary of Transportation shall issue regulations, in an accessible format, necessary for carrying out this subpart (other than ).July 26, 1990section 12143 of this title

children.heading: Standards
children.label: b Standards
children.text: The regulations issued under this section and shall include standards applicable to facilities and vehicles covered by this part. The standards shall be consistent with the minimum guidelines and requirements issued by the Architectural and Transportation Barriers Compliance Board in accordance with .section 12143 of this titlesection 12204 of this title
